g.text: "Regalia Recovered, Court Left to the Sea"
Blast the silt with a burst of air.
Ease through the flooded gallery mouth.
Pry the barnacled reliquary door here.
Race the rival for the circlet.
Feint low and take the high approach.
The rival calls a false truce at the dai...
Wade the deep sump for the shortcut.
Move pillar to pillar toward the font.
Confront the rival at the font.
The font silt hides a second, deeper dro...
Kill the lamp and take it in the dark.
Search the rival dropped cache too.
Move on the rival at the control ring.
Out-climb the rival to the shaft.
Race the rising water straight up.
The rival feints toward the ascent shaft...
A wing of the dome peels loose above the...
Refuse and gamble on the water.
Turn back to seal the court.
Climb now, leave the court open.
Skip the seal, secure your ascent.
Accept the partial seal and climb.
Push the ascent to beat the rival.
Ease off at the last stop.
Push the passage to its end.
Push the passage to its end.
Push the passage to its end.
Push the passage to its end.
Push the passage to its end.
Follow the rope of bubbles up.
Push the passage to its end.
Sound the pillar-forest for a shortcut.
Push the passage to its end.
Cut through the sunken observatory store...
Push the passage to its end.
Push the passage to its end.
